title: Well-executed targeted dependency upgrade with verification
code_snippet:
# Targeted CVE fix:
$ go get golang.org/x/net@v0.17.0
$ go mod tidy
$ go mod verify  # all modules verified
$ govulncheck ./...  # No vulnerabilities found
$ go test ./...  # All tests pass
$ git diff go.mod go.sum  # Review changes
expected_feedback: No violations. Correctly executes targeted upgrade: (1) specific version pinned, not go get -u, (2) go mod tidy after upgrade, (3) integrity verified, (4) govulncheck confirms CVE resolved, (5) tests pass, (6) changes reviewed before commit.
